name: Personal Murder Theater: Strangled Roots
short_description: Immerse yourself in this grotesque visual novel. Unspeakable secrets, sinister crimes, and a macabre obsession weave this tale, where sanity crumbles beneath the tide of perversion and human cruelty. The first chapter in a new independent anthology of visual novels.
detailed_description:
¡¡English Translation Coming Very Soon!!!! Add the game to your wishlist.

Do you love horror visual novels? Then you’ll love this new anthology of twisted tales.

Welcome to your personal theater of horrors—welcome to "Personal Murder Theater". Experience firsthand the most terrifying, unsettling, and violent stories produced in Mexico, where madness corrupts human minds, awakening cruelty and the commission of murders.

What’s on today’s program? The curtain rises to present:

Chapter 1: Strangled Roots

A mundane family visit twists into a deranged nightmare when a horrifying secret unravels reality, exposing a deadly truth that corrodes sanity and unearths the vilest acts committed by a rotting mind.

You and your wife, Daniela, decide to visit Jimena (Daniela’s twin sister) following the tragic and sudden death of her husband. However, the moment you shake her hand, you notice her strange behavior—more erratic than ever. Slowly, you uncover bizarre clues that culminate in an unspeakable act, forever warping the course of history. Are you ready to step into this stage of madness?

  • A violent story. Secrets, death, and homicide—do you have the stomach to uncover what Jimena is hiding?

  • Detailed Descriptions. Immerse yourself in the story with vivid depictions of settings, actions, and the gruesome details of every crime.

  • Classic Visual Novel Experience. Lose yourself in the narrative without distractions or interruptions.

  • Living Characters. Each with unique personalities, from erratic to quirky—you’ll struggle to say goodbye.

  • Your Choices Matter. Decide which questions to ask and unlock one of 3 completely different endings hidden in this tale. Which one is the true ending?

  • An Immersive Experience. Music, imagery, and sound effects work in harmony to pull you into the story. It’s like reading a book—but far more thrilling.

  • A Fully Independent Project. Written and developed by a single person.

  • New Anthology. This is the first chapter in a fresh horror visual novel series.

Has the curtain fallen? Not quite. The actors are preparing for the next scene, and guess who the protagonist will be? Here’s a hint: her name starts with "J"…
